---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: 'Epic: [Feature Name]'
labels: enhancement, epic
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve or the need it addresses.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe specific use cases where this feature would be beneficial:
1. Use case 1...
2. Use case 2...
3. Use case 3...

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Feature Request Process
Thank you for your feature request! Here's what happens next:

1. **Triage**: Our team will review your request within 5-7 business days
2. **Discussion**: We may reach out for clarification or additional details
3. **Planning**: If accepted, we'll add it to our project roadmap
4. **Implementation**: The feature will be broken down into subtasks and assigned
5. **Testing**: Rigorous testing to ensure quality
6. **Release**: The feature will be released in an upcoming version

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups or examples to help explain your feature.
